description:
# Open question

`bl init` walkthrough (mostly resolved; codify into spec §9 and pressure-test edge cases).

Edge cases to verify the spec covers:
- Re-init on an existing install: --reinit reruns the chain idempotently. Plugin contract requires init to be idempotent.
- No CWD git repo, no --remote, tracker enabled → fail at step 4 with clear error.
- CWD has origin but you want different balls remote → --remote override.
- `bl init --no-tracker` in a repo with origin: stealth despite a remote being available.
- Federation: `--center=<url>` writes config/plugins/tracker/remote.yaml during init.
- Step 8 federated-layer reread surfaces NEW plugins from center config — defer their `init` to next `bl prime`, or run now? Recommendation: defer + log notice.

Acceptance: §9 in the spec is unambiguous, and we have a written-down expected error message for each failure case.
title: Topic: bl init walkthrough + edge cases
